{"en":{"ABOUT_GDPR_ADS":"Ads","ABOUT_GDPR_ADS_TEXT":"Nearly all ad networks use personal information in the delivery of ads. Google AdSense and DFP both have built specific methodologies for disabling ads targeting at individuals. It is the publishers responsibility to ensure that no ads that use personal information are served to people that have not given consent. On Ezoic versions, this app will help with those decisions.","ABOUT_GDPR_DFP_LINK":"DFP EU User Consent","ABOUT_GDPR_DISCLAIMER":"The above information is not legal advice. The GDPR regulation is a lengthy, complex regulation and there are many parts to compliance. Here are a few links that we suggest reading:","ABOUT_GDPR_INFO_LINK":"GDPR Info","ABOUT_GDPR_INTRO1":"The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) (Regulation (EU) 2016/679) is a privacy and data protection regulation in the European Union (EU) and will be enforceable from May 25 2018 and requires no enabling legislation so automatically becomes binding and applicable on that date","ABOUT_GDPR_INTRO2":"The GDPR imposes new obligations on organisations that control or process relevant personal data and introduces new rights and protections for EU data subjects.","ABOUT_GDPR_INTRO3":"The GDPR applies to data processing carried out by organisations operating within the EU. It also applies to organisations outside the EU that offer goods or services to individuals in the EU.","ABOUT_GDPR_SITE_LINK":"GDPR Official Site","ABOUT_GDPR_TAB_TITLE":"About GDPR","ABOUT_GDPR_USER_CONSENT":"User Consent","ABOUT_GDPR_USER_CONSENT_TEXT":"Under the regulation, publishers are required to ask EU visitors for their consent before storing or processing any personal information. The definition of personal information is also expanded to include unique identifiers, unique cookies as well as information that, by itself, would not be able to be used to identify a person, but could be used in conjunction with other information to identify an individual. For example, birthdate by itself does not identify an individual, but the combination of birthdate, zip code and gender could conceivably identify an individual.","ABOUT_GDPR_USER_DATA_ACCESS":"User Data Access","ABOUT_GDPR_USER_DATA_ACCESS_TEXT":"Publishers must provide individuals the ability to view the information that is stored about them and the ability to require deletion of that data.","ABOUT_GDPR_WHITEPAPER_LINK":"GDPR WhitePaper","ACCEPT_MCM_MIGRATION_INVITE_ALERT":"Action Required: Please log in to your Google Ad Manager account and navigate to Admin > Multiple Customer Management to accept the new Ezoic network invite. Each new row must follow the ads.txt guidelines.","ADS_TXT_EZOIC_CHOOSE_FILE":"Please choose *.txt or *.csv file.","ADS_TXT_EZOIC_HELP_TEXT":"

This app will allow you to setup an Ads.txt file on your website. If Ads.txt is configured improperly, your website could see a decrease in ad earnings and fail to display certain ads until up to 24 hours after corrections are made (this is according to Google’s guidelines and Ads.txt support material).

The app will automatically add Ezoic ad partners to the file and ensure ads filled by Ezoic partners (including Google AdX) are implemented correctly on your Ads.txt file.

It is critical that you manually add all of your existing ad partners (including AdSense). Failing to add partners — or adding partners incorrectly — can prevent these partners from being able to display ads on your website.

We suggest reading more about Ads.txt here prior to implementing the app.

This app will append all of the info you add on this page to your existing ads.txt file. To turn on the ads.txt app you must have an original ads.txt file on your website or you must add at least one ad network on this page.

Ads.txt is a simple, flexible, and secure method for publishers and distributors to declare who is authorized to sell their inventory, improving transparency for programmatic buyers.

Ads.txt supports transparent programmatic digital media transactions and can remove the financial incentive from selling counterfeit and misrepresented media. Similar to robots.txt, ads.txt can only be posted to a domain by a publisher’s webmaster, making it valid and authentic. As a text file, ads.txt is easy to update, making it flexible. The data required to populate the file is readily available in the OpenRTB protocol, making it simple to gather and target. And because publishers sell their inventory through a variety of sales channels, ads.txt supports the following types of supplier relationships:

  • Domain owners who sell on exchanges through their own accounts
  • Networks and sales houses who programmatically sell on behalf of domain owners
  • Content syndication partnerships where multiple authorized sellers represent the same inventory

Ezoic is integrated with Ads.txt Manager, so you can use this tool to help manage and generate a valid ads.txt file for your site.

(You can still opt in again)","AD_CHARITY_HELP_INFO":"

Donate your unused ad inventory (ad spaces) to charity! When there are no advertisers bidding higher than the Ezoic system demands, Ezoic will serve an ad impressions for a charity instead.

Charity Ad Donation improves your optimization in two ways.

  1. Your CPMs remain high over time because you’re not accepting lower bid prices from advertisers.
  2. Less collapsing space on the page where ads would fill helps your core web vital score for Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) which may improve your search rankings.

While improving your website’s optimization, Ezoic aims to simultaneously raise awareness by serving these nonprofit ads and drive donations for each organization.

Join our give back initiative! Help Ezoic raise awareness by serving nonprofit ads while improving your optimization!

You can easily opt out of participating by simply selecting “Disable”.

Ad Restrictions allows you to control the number and types of ads on a page. This works based on a custom ruleset and rule you create. A ruleset contains the desired ad limits and type settings. A ruleset can contain many rules. The ruleset settings are only applied when a rule matches. A rule is matched when a user enters a url that has parameters which meet the conditions of the rule.

For example, if you wanted users who come from facebook to be shown no native ads, you can create a ruleset with Native Ads as Off and fill out the other necessary settings as needed.

Next, you can create a rule which contains a Rule Type as Referrer, Pattern Type as contains, and Rule Item as facebook.com

Now when a user enters in www.YourSiteHere.com?referrer=facebook.com, the user will not be shown any native ads


Please note: Ad Restrictions is not meant to be used to disable ads on a page. Instead if you wish to disable ads on a page please use the Disable Ads By Page

These templates can be applied to new and existing placeholders.","AD_TEMPLATES_CREATE_WZRD":"Create Template From Placeholder","AD_TEMPLATES_EDIT_WZRD":"Edit Placeholder Template","AD_TEMPLATES_HELP_BODY":"

Ad Templates help to reduce repetitive work to create similar placeholders across a publisher's site. Currently, styles and size criteria are supported.This section contains templates that have already been created that can now be edited.


In the Ad Tester application, you may click on the Copy button next to the placeholder you'd like to replicate. Here, you can name the template and adjust settings. By default, both styles and size criteria are imported, but you can choose to only import one or the other. Fluid and Multi-size settings will always be imported.


Once the Ad Template is saved, it will be ready for selection in new or existing placeholders.

","AD_TESTER_KEY_VALUE_INCLUDE_EXCLUDE":"

Choose if you want your rule to be an include or exclude rule.

An Include rule means you will only include if these settings are met.

An exclude rule means you will only exclude if these settings are met

E.G. it can act as an allow/block list. If you include placeholders it will only show those and block all others, if it is an exclude rule it will block those and show all others.

","AD_TESTER_KEY_VALUE_PRIORITY":"

Choose the priority level you want this rule to have (5 being the highest). If it conflicts with another rule you created the one with the higher priority will take precedence!

We've detected a compatibility on {{domain}}. We have identified a Cloudflare IP in your DNS records, as opposed to the site's actual IP address. The Cloudflare IP then blocks the Googlebot from crawling, leading to the site looking down on Google's end.

To resolve this, please reach out to your host and ask them for the real IP of the site, once they give you the IP, update the DNS records in Ezoic so that the IPs of your DNS records match the updated IP from your host.

Need support? Get in touch with us in the Onboarding Community.

","CONSENT_VENDOR_HELP":"View Documentation","CONSENT_VENDOR_HELP1":"

As a data controller you are responsible for managing vendors on the page and ensuring that they abide by consent from the user. Ezoic CMP provides an easy method of obtaining consents for vendors who may not be part of the IAB Global Vendor List.

Enter the vendor details into the form and they will appear in the CMP at the bottom of the vendor list automatically.

To use the consent data obtained for these vendors you must include a script that listens for these consents. You can use the information provided to this function to properly configure your additional vendors for the consent given. You can find the ezoic assigned vendor IDs for your vendors in the table. These IDs are integers, assigned statically, and unique to your vendor in the Ezoic system.

YOUR OPTIONS:

  1. Opt-in Now: Don't worry, if you've already earned a badge it will be transferred and you won't lose your progress! If you have not yet earned a badge, you will complete the newer, quicker version of the courses.
  2. Complete Current Courses by February 1st, 2022: On February 1st, we will be transitioning all Access Now publishers who have not completed the program to our new process.
","EDUCATION_SWITCH_OPTION_BUTTON_1":"1. Opt-in Now!","EDUCATION_SWITCH_OPTION_BUTTON_2":"2. I'll complete courses by Feb 1","EDUCATION_SWITCH_POST_CHANGE_FAQ_BODY":"

What happens to the badges I’ve already earned?
Don’t worry, your progress is not lost! Any earned badges have been transferred over and are reflected in the new program!

What happens if I was in the middle of coursework for a badge (badge has not been earned)?
All publishers were notified of this change and given ample time to complete courses through the old program. If you have not done so, you will need to complete the portion of the new program that corresponds to the unearned badge.

Similar to robots.txt, ads.txt can only be posted to a domain by a publisher’s webmaster, making it valid and authentic. As a text file, ads.txt is easy to update, making it flexible. The data required to populate the file is readily available in the OpenRTB protocol, making it simple to gather and target. And because publishers sell their inventory through a variety of sales channels, ads.txt supports the following types of supplier relationships:","FE_GET_STARTED_ADS_TXT_DESCRIPTION_3":"Domain owners who sell on exchanges through their own accounts","FE_GET_STARTED_ADS_TXT_DESCRIPTION_4":"Networks and sales houses who programmatically sell on behalf of domain owners","FE_GET_STARTED_ADS_TXT_DESCRIPTION_5":"Content syndication partnerships where multiple authorized sellers represent the same inventory","FE_GET_STARTED_ALL_SELLERS":"All Sellers","FE_GET_STARTED_AUTHORIZE_OPTION_1_DESCRIPTION":"You can skip this step by clicking next and authorizing sellers later.","FE_GET_STARTED_AUTHORIZE_OPTION_1_TITLE":"Option 1: Skip & Continue","FE_GET_STARTED_FEATURED_SELLERS":"Featured Sellers","FE_GET_STARTED_HEADER":"Let's Get Started","FE_GET_STARTED_IMPORT":"Import","FE_GET_STARTED_IMPORT_BUTTON":"IMPORT ADS.TXT","FE_GET_STARTED_IMPORT_DESCRIPTION":"There are a number of ways to import entries into the AdsTxtManager.com system. Depending on your setup (WordPress Plugin, Basic Ads), you can view and edit the settings for your placeholders. For example, if you wanted to edit the styles of your placeholder you can click on the pencil icon and edit the settings in the Ad Styles Tab.","GENERATED_AD_TESTER_HELP_TITLE":"Generated Ads Help","GENERIC_STATUS":"Status","GEN_RESPONSE_NOTI":"Generated Responses","GEN_RESPONSE_NOTI_DESCRIPTION":"AI will generate a response and provide an email notification for review and approval to create a reply to a comment.","GETTING_STARTED_AD_TESTER_PAGE3_CONTENT":"Placeholders are locations ads could be shown.","GETTING_STARTED_KEY_VALUE_PAGE1_CONTENT":"Key Values are a way to tell our system information about your page, allowing you to target specific pages for a variety of use cases.

A key is an identifier used to extract information about the content on your page. This information can be used to display content specific advertisements based on the tags present in your HTML or via cookies.

Keys and their associated values are passed to our system from existing attributes in your HTML or cookies. Specific values that you've added in this app can be targeted. You can create up to six unique keys and each key can have up to 1,000 predefined values.

","GETTING_STARTED_KEY_VALUE_PAGE1_TITLE":"Welcome To Key-Values!","GETTING_STARTED_KEY_VALUE_PAGE2_CONTENT":"Key-values can be used for a variety of purposes. They can:

  • Identify pages on a website for reporting in Big Data Analytics
  • Control what placeholders to show
  • Help target ad inventory using Direct Ad Orders
Key values, like other targeting, help your advertisers and buyers reach their intended audience or demographic. They can add value to your offerings when negotiating campaigns.","GETTING_STARTED_KEY_VALUE_PAGE2_TITLE":"About Key Values","GETTING_STARTED_KEY_VALUE_PAGE3_CONTENT":"The meta tag defines metadata about an HTML document. Meta tags always go inside the head element; and can be used to give information about anything from page category to author name. Metadata will not be displayed on the page, but is machine parsable. Metadata is used by browsers (how to display content or reload page), search engines (keywords), and other web services.

  • Advertiser Preference: Some advertisers may choose not to show ads on your site based on your content. If you're fine with this reduced demand, no changes are needed. These will not lead to account bans or terminations.
  • Policy: These require action. Fix the issue(s) listed below and make sure your site complies with Ezoic & Google policies to restore regular ad serving.

Please note we are not blocking ads across the site but, if you are noticing a drop in revenue, it may be due to Google ad restrictions from the violation below, not actions we've taken.

We provide a link in the privacy policy we generate for your site that enables users to change their choices. You can also provide visitors with additional opportunities to change their choices by appending the parameter ez_force_cookie_consent=1 to any url on your domain. For example, if your site was http://www.example.org, you could link to http://www.example.org?ez_force_cookie_consent=1. There is also the option to enable a floating button, which will always enable the user to change their consent decision. To enable that button, go to the 'settings' tab of our consent management and enable the 'floating privacy center'.","INSTRUCTIONS_CHANGE_TEXT_JAVASCRIPT":"In addition to that, you can also force the consent dialogueue via the following JavaScript function:","INSTRUCTIONS_CHANGE_TITLE":"Letting users change their consent","INSTRUCTIONS_COOKIES_TEXT":"Because consent management controls which cookies are sent to a user, you need to make sure your cookies are categorized properly. In the Cookie List tab, go through each cookie that your sites send. Select a Category based on what the cookie is tracking. Any cookies that are necessary for your site to work properly (such as login, cart, checkout), should be marked as Necessary. Cookies for tracking behavior should be Statistics, and those used for ads or marketing as Marketing. If a cookie contains personal info, mark it as such. Finally, describe the purpose of the cookie in simple terms.","INSTRUCTIONS_COOKIES_TITLE":"Categorizing Cookies","INSTRUCTIONS_CUSTOMIZE_TEXT":"If you need to make changes to your site content, tracking or ads based on user's consent choices, you must include an EzConsentCallback javascript function on your page.     When you're ready to begin using Ezoic's technology, the system will act as a proxy. If a user visits your site, the request will come to Ezoic and the system will call back to your original hosting to grab the content and serve the optimized webpage back to the user. So, you keep your website exactly where it is and keep updating or adding content the same way you've always done, and Ezoic essentially acts as a proxy between your server and the end users, which enables us to optimize the experience for each user to improve overall performance.     targeting value, analytics label (optional)","KEY_VALUE_APP":"Key Value","KEY_VALUE_APP_DESCRIPTION":"Insert your existing ad campaign targeting options by page or placeholder.","KEY_VALUE_CONFIRM_DELETE":"Are you sure you want to delete {{KEY}} key?","KEY_VALUE_HELP_TEXT":"

    Key Value is how you tell our system what your page is about, this allows you to target your pages with specific advertisements.

    ","KEY_VALUE_HELP_TITLE":"Key Value Help","KEY_VALUE_INFO":"

    A key is an identifier used to extract information about the content on your page. This information is used to display content specific advertisements based on the tags present in your HTML.

    Keys and their associated values are passed to our system from existing attributes in your HTML. Only values that you've added in this app will be included. You can create up to 6 unique keys and each key can have up to 1,000 predefined values.

    ","KEY_VALUE_KEY_INFO_COOKIE_DESCRIPTION":"

    With this option, Ezoic will look for Cookies sent from users where the name is the Cookie Name you enter below and the value of the cookie is the any value that you insert into the value table..

    ","KEY_VALUE_KEY_INFO_COOKIE_TITLE":"Set Cookie (key,value) pair","KEY_VALUE_KEY_INFO_EZOIC_DESCRIPTION":"

    With this option you can include a custom element on your pages that will contain a 'value' property as targeting information to Ezoic. Here's an example:

    {{CODE1}}

    With your current settings, our system will look for the following element, where the value attribute contains any value that you insert in the Values Table.

    {{CODE2}}","KEY_VALUE_KEY_INFO_EZOIC_TITLE":"Custom Ezoic Element","KEY_VALUE_KEY_INFO_META_DESCRIPTION":"

    The Meta Tag is a place to define meta data on your site to give information to the browser. Make your bid parameter more specific or default to all available using the dropdowns.","MEDIATION_HB_PAUSE":"Pause All","MEDIATION_HB_PAUSED":"Paused","MEDIATION_HB_UNPAUSE":"Unpause All","MEDIATION_HEADER_BIDDING":"Header Bidding Mediation","MEDIATION_HEADER_BIDDING_ALERT":"Mediation Header Bidding Error","MEDIATION_HEADER_BIDDING_DESC":"Header Bidding Mediation allows you to connect your existing accounts with header bidding networks and enable them to bid on your advertising inventory. All revenue generated through Mediation will be paid directly through your header bidding network account.
    Note: Mediation is for you to connect your existing accounts with header bidding networks. Ezoic has already secured partnerships with several top header bidding networks on your behalf, so you do not need to apply to new networks to work with them.","MEDIATION_HELP_INFO":"

    The Mediation App is a great way for you to make sure you are getting paid the most for every ad impression on your site.

    The Mediation App works by letting your own ad network accounts compete on Ezoic traffic against Google's Ad Exchange and Ezoic's other ad partners for the ad inventory on your site. Whoever is willing to pay the most wins the impression, ensuring you're paid the highest amount possible.

    For example, if you link your AdSense account to Ezoic via the Mediation App, your AdSense account would be able to compete for the ad inventory against the Ad Exchange. If your own account is willing to pay more than the Ad Exchange, it will win the impression.

    On the Ezoic dashboard you'll see the 'Mediation Ad Partner' earnings reported. This is the revenue generated by your Adsense on the Ezoic % of traffic. Money collected through mediation will be paid by Google to your own account and be reported in Ezoic as 'Mediation Earnings'. Any other earnings on traffic going to your original site are handled separately from Ezoic.

    This adds another layer of competition that really benefits publishers!

    *To use mediation with AdSense you will need to be part of the AdSense Certified Partner Program. To get an invitation link please email your Ezoic representative or visit support.ezoic.com and we can send you an invite link!

Be in the know on links that are throwing errors to your visitors, be able to test titles that can drive people to your content and keep them there, and feel empowered that the new content you create is based on competitive gap analysis that can outperform and rank better.","NICHE_IQ_ON_PAGE_SEO_FEEDBACK_FORM":"On-Page SEO Feedback Form","NICHE_IQ_PAGEBOOSTER_DESCRIPTION":"

    Page Booster identifies pages that are losing momentum (i.e. search traffic) and discovers keywords to enhance the article so it regains the lost traffic and position in search results. Tracking pages and detecting those that are starting to perform worse can be time-consuming. Page Booster will track all pages from your website and determine if they are trending up, stable or trending down. For those trending down, it provides a list of keywords that are losing search traffic. Report is generated weekly.

    The Overview tab shows you how your site is doing overall, Page List tab provides details for each page including suggested keywords to base your article improvements on.

    The initial data may take 4 weeks to appear since it needs to collect enough data to detect trends. This application requires Google Search Console to be authorized in the Settings section.

    Overview offers a quick glance at your site. We show you the top three pages that gained the most search traffic and the pages that lost most search traffic over the past month. You can find suggestions on how to improve pages trending down in the Page List tab.

    ","PAGEBOOSTER_TITLE_PAGELIST":"Page Trend List","PAGEBOOSTER_TITLE_PAGELIST_DESCRIPTION":"

    List of pages organized by overall trend. Particular attention should be given to pages trending down. Those pages have lost a significant amount of search traffic over the past month. Click on the plus sign (+) next to a URL to see the keywords that saw the largest increase and decrease in traffic. Keywords that lost most traffic are prime candidates to focus on to improve your page and regain lost traffic.

    The feature tracks pages where (i) the domain has at least 100 pageviews in the past 4 weeks, (ii) have an average monthly search position between 1-20. URLs that have very volatile traffic will be shown in the "Indeterminate" tab. The feature will report up to 100 pages with the larges change.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation!","PQ_APPEALS_FAQ_MORE_DETAILS_Q":"Can you provide more details about the detection process?","PQ_APPEALS_FAQ_PERM_A":"No, oftentimes this can be resolved by investigating your traffic and putting protective measures in place.     Appeal Denied: Your video-sharing restrictions remain in effect.

    Thank you for your appeal regarding the restriction on sharing your videos across external domains. After a thorough review, our Team has upheld the decision to disable your video sharing capabilities. This decision remains final, and your content will not be shared across the Open.Video Network.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_BLOCK_SHARE_NOT_SUBMITTED":"

    Video sharing disabled: Your videos will no longer be shared across the Open.Video Network

    We recently reviewed your account and found that many of your videos contain content that falls under our restricted policies, such as (but not limited to) sexual content, depictions of weapons, or shocking material. While this content isn’t prohibited on our platform, many of our partner publishers prefer not to display it. Therefore, we’ve restricted your account’s ability to share videos across our platform. We understand this may be frustrating, but these measures help maintain a safe and welcoming environment across our network. You may appeal this decision one time. To initiate an appeal, we encourage you to first review our content policies, then either delete or unshare the videos that fall under these restricted categories. Once you’ve taken these steps, you can request a review.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_BLOCK_SHARE_UNDER_REVIEW":"

    Appeal submitted: Your video-sharing status is under review.

    We’ve received your appeal regarding the restriction on sharing your videos across the Open.Video Network. Our Team is currently reviewing the changes you've made to your content. We will notify you once a decision has been made. In the meantime, your video sharing restrictions will remain in place. Thank you for your patience and understanding as we work through this process.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_BLOCK_UPLOAD":"

    Video Uploads Disabled: You can no longer upload or import videos.

    Your ability to upload new videos or import videos from YouTube into your Open.Video dashboard has been disabled. This means you will no longer be able to add new content to your account. If you have any questions or believe this action was taken in error, please refer to our content policies or contact support for further assistance.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_CHANNEL_REMOVE_FROM_HUMIX_ACCOUNT_BANNED_NOT_SUBMITTED":"

    All Open.Video Features Disabled for Your Channel

    All Open.Video options for your channel have been turned off because we identified prohibited content or detected other actions that violate our terms and conditions. This includes:

    • Share: No videos will be shared across the Open.Video Network.
    • Network: No videos from other publishers will be displayed on your site.
    • Uploading: You cannot upload new videos or import from YouTube.
    • Visibility: Your content will not be displayed on Open.Video.

    This change means your Open.Video account will not have any active features until further notice. You may appeal this decision one time. To do so, please first review our content policies and ensure that all videos violating these policies are deleted. Once you have taken these steps, you can request a review through your dashboard. If you have any questions or need more information, please refer to our guidelines.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_CHANNEL_REMOVE_FROM_HUMIX_DENIED":"

    Appeal Denied: Open.Video Features Remain Disabled

    We regret to inform you that your appeal has been reviewed and denied. As a result, the following Open.Video features will remain disabled for your channel:

    • Share: No videos will be shared across the Open.Video Network.
    • Network: No videos from other publishers will be displayed on your site.
    • Uploading: You cannot upload new videos or import from YouTube.
    • Visibility: Your content will not be displayed on Open.Video.

    This decision is final. Please ensure that your content complies with our policies to avoid future issues.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_CHANNEL_REMOVE_FROM_HUMIX_NOT_SUBMITTED":"

    ","PQ_APPEAL_CHANNEL_REMOVE_FROM_HUMIX_UNDER_REVIEW":"

    ","PQ_APPEAL_DOMAIN_BLOCK_NETWORK":"

    Video Display Disabled: Videos from other creators will not appear on your network.

    Your ability to display videos from other publishers on your domain has been disabled. This means that only your own videos will be visible on your site or channel, and content from other publishers will not be shown. This change is in line with our platform policies. If you have any questions or need assistance, please refer to our guidelines.

    ","PQ_APPEAL_DOMAIN_BLOCK_NETWORK_MONETIZATION_DENIED":"

    Monetization Eligibility Removed: Your ability to earn revenue through Open.Video has been disabled.

    We regret to inform you that due to violations of our monetization policies, your eligibility to monetize through Open.Video has been removed, effective immediately. While you will no longer be able to earn revenue from the Open.Video player, you may continue to upload your own videos and share them across the platform. If the underlying issue is resolved, you may become eligible to regain monetization access in the future.

    Thank you,
    Open.Video Compliance Team

","PREMIUM_DESCRIPTION_1":"Ezoic Premium is an invite-only program that provides participating publishers with additional Premium ad revenue, advanced features, API access, more timely reporting, and expert advice.","PREMIUM_DESCRIPTION_2":"Ezoic Premium is a subscription-based service that requires a commitment on the part of the publisher. However, Premium publishers typically earn far more in additional revenue than the cost of the service and many see traffic and performance improvements as a result as well.","PREMIUM_DESCRIPTION_3":"Please note that the program is only available to publishers that have used the Ezoic platform for an extended period of time and meet other quality criteria. In addition, we are only able to accept a limited number of new Premium publishers per month so we are unable to accommodate many requests for participation.","PREMIUM_DESCRIPTION_4":"Register your interest in the Ezoic Premium program by clicking the button below.","PREMIUM_INTERESTED":"I'm interested!","PREMIUM_INTEREST_SAVED":"Your interest has been saved!","PREMIUM_LITERAL":"Premium","PREMIUM_REVENUE_1":"Premium Revenue only displays the","PREMIUM_REVENUE_2":"increase","PREMIUM_REVENUE_3":"in revenue you have received from participation in the premium program. Your other revenue is unaffected.","PREMIUM_REVENUE_EXPLAINED_TEXT":"Premium revenue is often generated through the use of programmatic guaranteed deals with specific advertisers that are interested in your inventory. These guaranteed deals tend to be at very high CPM rates (often above $50 cpms) but only on a limited amount of inventory. Using Ezoic, all of these deals still must outbid the remainder of the real time auction in order to display. In order to display Premium Revenue to you in the Ezoic reporting, we calculate (or predict when data isn't available) the delta between what you would have received for the same inventory without Premium and display only the increase to you as Premium Revenue. When you're viewing your Premium Revenue numbers, you can be sure that there is no lost opportunity and your normal revenue remains the same as it would have been if you did not participate in the Premium Program.","PREMIUM_REVENUE_EXPLAINED_TITLE":"How Premium Revenue Works","PREMIUM_REVENUE_YTD":"Premium revenue since January 1","PREMIUM_UPGRADE_AVAILABLE":"Congratulations, you're now eligible to move up to the next Premium plan level.     A Regular Expression, or Regex, is a special text string for describing a search pattern.

    The Script Regex will look for the pattern that is submitted and remove any tag containing that pattern.

    If you want to remove any scripts containing yellow from your site, then an example of the regex you would submit to remove it would be the following...

    Script Name = Yellow, Script Regex = yellow

    Both of these scripts will now be removed from your site:

    <script src="https://yellow.com"></script>, <script src="https://ezoic.com/yellow"></script>

    You can also make more dynamic patterns:

    If Script Regex = green/[abc] any script containing green/a, green/b or green/c will be removed, but a script containing green/f, would stay

    There are many more examples that you can reference and test out at regex101.com

    Place the scripts that you wish to remove inside of Test String, then enter your Script Regex in Regular Expression. If there is a match, then it will be removed.
